kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The artisan in Southgate's levy is lower than both Rowan and the Mason.
At most two of (the members of the Joiners' Guild and the artisan with 2 coins) belong to the North Side.
Between Wulfric and Millpond, one goes with Blacksmith and the other with 3 coins.
Exactly two of Aldric, Godfrey, Wulfric, and the Mason belong to the North Side.
Exactly one of these is true: Aldric goes with Eastcheap; Wulfric goes with Millpond; Potter goes with 3 coins.
Riverside goes with exactly two of Aldric, Tanner, and 7 coins.
Exactly one of (the members of the Gate Ward and Wulfric) belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
Beatrix goes with at least one of Blacksmith, Highrow, or 5 coins.
Southgate, 2 coins, and 4 coins go with Carpenter, Mason, and Potter, in some order.
Either Wulfric belongs to the Gate Ward or both members of the Clothiers' Guild belong to the Gate Ward.
The artisan in Oldwall's levy is higher than both Wulfric and the Carpenter.
Godfrey goes with exactly two of Tanner, Riverside, and 5 coins.
Either Mason goes with Beatrix or someone in the Ironmongers' Guild goes with Beatrix.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
